reviews.comment:
La que nos atendió dijo que no tenía café y a los 5 minutos estaba haciendo uno, creo que juzgaron por la ropa y ni nos quisieron atender bien. Horrible atención del full YPF

(Translated by Google)
The woman who served us said she didn't have coffee, but five minutes later she was making some. I think they judged us by our clothes and didn't even try to give us proper service. Horrible service at the YPF station.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas Gracias por su reseña! lamentamos lo ocurrido, L@ esperamos nuevamente para mejorar la experiencia
